results.title: Detecting SANDWORM_MODE and AI Toolchain Supply Chain Attacks
results.snippet: Learn about the anatomy of the SANDWORM_MODE infection chain mapped against the components of a modern AI CI/CD pipeline.In February 2026, Socket.dev published research on a multi-stage npm supply chain worm operating under the internal flag SANDWORM_MODE .

results.title: Inside the September 2025 npm Supply-Chain Attack

results.title: Supply Chain Nightmare Nx Npm Plugin Leaks 2349 Secrets – Ivyrem
results.snippet: Nx supply chain attack on Aug 26, 2025 leaked 2,349 secrets via npm packages, risking GitHub and cloud accounts.In a shocking supply chain attack, attackers exploited vulnerabilities in the widely used Nx build system, compromising 2,349 GitHub, cloud, and AI credentials.

results.title: Shai Hulud Worm Hits npm: 2025 Supply Chain Attack Exposed
results.snippet: This npm supply chain attack 2025 variant, often referred to as Shai-Hulud 2.0, infected over 1,000 npm packages by November 24, 2025, according to reports from leading security firms like Wiz, Aikido, and Unit 42.
